title: Carpets Core
description: Simple lib for creating multifaced carpets
body:
Simple lib for creating multifaced carpets.

Features:
- contains a base class for a multipart block that can be placed on the ground/wall/ceiling;
- implemented logic for replacing a block with a multipart block;
- datagen helpers for models/blockstates/loot table;
- neoforge/fabric support.

What is the idea?
Using this library you can create flat multipart blocks quickly and efficiently.

![neoforge](https://github.com/thomasglasser/thomasglasser/blob/main/files/badges/cozy/supported/neoforge_64h.png?raw=true) ![quilt](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/supported/quilt_64h.png) ![fabric](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/supported/fabric_64h.png)
